name: .aider.conf.yml — Standard Setup
description: Standard Aider configuration with Claude Sonnet, auto-commits, and linting.
content:
# Aider Configuration

# Model settings
model: claude-sonnet-4-5
edit-format: diff

# Git integration
auto-commits: true
dirty-commits: true

# Code quality
lint: true
lint-cmd: "npm run lint"

# File management
auto-lint: true
show-diffs: true

# UI preferences
dark-mode: true
pretty: true

name: .aider.conf.yml — Multi-Model Setup
description: Aider configuration using different models for different tasks (Sonnet for code, GPT-4o for chat).
content:
# Aider Multi-Model Configuration

# Primary model for code edits
model: claude-sonnet-4-5
edit-format: diff

# Weak model for simple tasks
weak-model: gpt-4o-mini

# Editor model for large refactors
editor-model: claude-opus-4

# Git settings
auto-commits: true
commit-prompt: true

# Linting
lint: true
lint-cmd: "npm run lint && npm run typecheck"
auto-lint: true

# Test integration
test-cmd: "npm test"
auto-test: false

name: .aiderignore
description: Ignore patterns for Aider to exclude generated files and large assets.
content:
# Dependencies
node_modules/
venv/
.venv/
__pycache__/

# Build outputs
dist/
build/
.next/
out/

# Generated files
*.min.js
*.map
package-lock.json
pnpm-lock.yaml

# Large assets
*.png
*.jpg
*.jpeg
*.gif
*.svg
*.ico
*.woff
*.woff2

# Secrets
.env
.env.local
*.key
*.pem
